FUCK（The Wild One）

Damn, what kind of type is this?

Dimension Pattern: MLL-LHL-LLM-MLL-HLH
Congratulations! You are not even in the human category. You got the once-in-a-million FUCK type. In the civilized city of humankind, a human-shaped wild weed appeared - impossible to kill with any herbicide, and impossible to tame. In the FUCK worldview, social rules mean almost nothing. The emotional switch is a physical toggle: FUCK YEAH and FUCK OFF. This type is not just chasing pleasure; it is chasing a life force that charges through the body like a storm. While everyone else gets domesticated, FUCK is the last howl in the wilderness.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!

Start SBTI Test
